question: Why did the user reject the cloud migration plan?
answer: Because the demo needed to stay simple and avoid risky infrastructure changes.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: My name is Maya and I work as a product designer in Denver.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I prefer concise answers and I do not like emoji in work messages.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: I will keep responses concise and professional.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: The migration notes are in docs/migration/phase1.md and the default branch is main.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I rejected the cloud migration plan because the demo needs to stay simple and avoid risky infrastructure changes.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Understood. We will keep the demo on the local stack.

question: When was the project review moved to?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: The project review is on Tuesday at 2 pm.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: I added the review meeting to the calendar.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Please update it: the project review was moved to Wednesday at 3 pm.

turns.speaker: assistant

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: The prior Tuesday slot is no longer current.
